title: The Crew Drifts Toward a Strange Island
description: On pages 11–14, Luffy, Zoro, and Nami reach a strange island where Gaimon and the rare animals guard a lonely mystery.
scene: The crew’s lighthearted exploration turns into a small fable about treasure, isolation, and the life Gaimon built after being trapped on the island.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: How did you get to this island?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You mentioned earlier that you were pirates right?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Yes, there are three of us

dialogue.speaker: Gaimon
dialogue.text: I was also once a pirate!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Oh!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's nice being a pirate, venturing for treasures,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's even okay if I risk my life...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Do you have any maps?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We have a Naviga- Tional map for the "Grandline"!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm going for "One piece"!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What? "One piece"?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And you intend to go to the "Grand Line"?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Um?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Which one is the "grand line"?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: this... Uncle cauliflower head, you don't know?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I don't really know how to read maps!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Oh, I see!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Is that how pirates are supposed to talk...?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: BLA BLA BLA

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Listen!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Do you know the "Red Line"?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I know!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Thats the land that separates the oceans

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Yes! There are 2 oceans in this world!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And the land that splits the world's two oceans

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: is called the "Red Land"!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Using the city of "Red Line" as the centre,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: GRAND LINE

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Draw a line around the world across the opposite way.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And that is the "Grand Line"!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: In history, only the pirate King Gold Roger has con-quered this route!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Also, it is the most dangerous route!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: "One piece" is surely in that place!

summary: This part works as a pause between major arcs, showing that the sea contains strange lives and unusual dreams beyond simple battles.
